parameters.content:
## Lead intake
1. Create an **Outreach API** credential (Header Auth): name `Authorization`, value `Bearer <API_KEY>`.
2. Point the trigger at your leads spreadsheet (columns: email, first_name, last_name, role, company, website, industry, notes).
3. Replace `OUTREACH_BASE_URL` in the HTTP node with your Worker URL (e.g. https://centrisec-outreach.<subdomain>.workers.dev).
4. Activate. New rows are deduped and suppression-checked by the Worker; per-row results come back in the response.
